title: Do you have any ibuprofen?
description: Replaces totems with the "Do you have any ibuprofen?" meme
body:
Adds everyone's favourite meme, ["Do you have any ibuprofen?"](https://knowyourmeme.com/memes/do-you-have-any-ibuprofen-i-got-a-headache) as your totem :3

## ALL NEW!
32x texture!
![Preview of the 32x texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58e2cc506773eacf617e4667ac8ae2d3a981ebb3_0.webp)
